历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 264, 173, 85, 173, and 302 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking numbers). In the last two years, it moved from 85 to 302, a cumulative backward shift of about 217 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 302. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hubei Province was 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 57 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 86, an increase of 29 from 2025 (approximately 51% increase), a notable expansion that helps lower admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving topics such as school management responses, campus safety, and cafeteria/dormitory issues, but overall attention remains extremely high. It ranks 2nd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application interest. Historical admission anomaly signals are low attention, with no obvious gaps recorded. It has numerous A+/A/A- disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A+, Architecture A+, Law A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A+, etc., with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Tsinghua University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, Hubei Province has approximately 393,700 total candidates, a slight increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 251,000 Physics Category candidates, leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings in recent years, the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan by about 51% (substantially lowering admission difficulty), the high Douyin popularity reflecting continuously rising application interest (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the slight increase in the number of local candidates, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 302, the expansion effect dominates but must account for the offsetting effect of intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 394, with a range of 349–439.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (PUMC; Eight-Year Medical Program)
- Science Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management; Dual Degree in Computer Science and Finance)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Automation
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian Academy; Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Architecture, Planning, Landscape; Five-Year Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong Academy/Zijing Academy; Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 349–439, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 349), you can prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (PUMC). If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 439), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2. All of Tsinghua University's majors are evaluated at the top level, so major selection should be based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 24th, 10th (2023), and 9th (2024), showing an overall upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), stabilizing around 10th in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2024 is about 9th (no History Category data for 2025); the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for History Category was 3 students in 2021, 3 in 2023, and 4 in 2024; the 2026 plan expands to 7 students, an increase of 3 students (approximately 75%) compared to 2024, a significant expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many consecutive years; reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, but Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), indicating extremely high application attention; historical admission anomaly signal is low attention; Tsinghua University has A+ in Law, A+ in Business Administration, A in Applied Economics, A- in Sociology, A- in Chinese Language and Literature, etc., with top-tier humanities and social sciences strength. Law major popularity is recommended as slightly hot, Economics/Finance majors are differentiated and wait-and-see; total number of examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 142,500 in History Category based on historical proportion, a slight increase in examinee numbers; provincial control.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical rankings stabilizing around 10th in recent years, the significant expansion of the History Category enrollment plan in 2026 by about 75% (significantly reducing admission difficulty), and the high Douyin popularity reflecting continuously rising application attention, the expansion effect dominates on the baseline ranking of 9th in 2024; predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13th, with a range of 11–15th.
